title: CHAFEE EDUCATION AND TRAINING VOUCHER PROGRAM - 211info
text: HIGHER EDUCATION COORDINATING COMMISSION CHAFEE EDUCATION AND TRAINING VOUCHER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides funding to help current or former foster care youth with post secondary education and training. Final Chafee Grant disbursement must be received the term before the youth turns age 26. 3225 25th Street SE Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: -Currently be in child welfare foster care, or -Had been in child welfare foster care for at least 180 days (six months) after applicants 13th birthday and exited substitute care at age 14 or older -Be a former foster youth who was adopted or entered into a guardianship on or after 13th birthday, and adoption/guardianship finalized after 9/1/2015 -Must be 25 or younger to apply Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 687-7400 2 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 687-7400 ext 2 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Student Financial Aid * Former Foster Children Student Financial Aid * Foster Children Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - DECEASED OR DISABLED PUBLIC SAFETY OFFICER GRANT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OFFICE OF STUDENT ACCESS AND COMPLETION EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON BARBER AND HAIRDRESSER GRANT PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON OPPORTUNITY GRANT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROMISE GRANT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON TEACHER SCHOLARS PROGRAM GRANT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON TRIBAL STUDENT GRANT MILITARY SERVICE - OREGON NATIONAL GUARD STATE TUITION ASSISTANCE PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OREGON STUDENT CHILD CARE GRANT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HIGHER EDUCATION COORDINATING COMMISSION
